title: Neuroscience (English) Master Program Application and Fees
content:
Neuroscience (English) Master Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Spring

Semester online application deadline: December 15, 2025

Application Deadline: Sunday, January 25, 2026

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, January 28, 2026

Main List Registration Deadlines: January 28 - February 4, 2026

Reserve List Registration Deadlines: February 5 - 13, 2026

Click for Online Pre-Registration Link

ALES Score Type: NUMERICAL (SAY)

Click here

for Online Pre-Registration Link.

NOTE:

ALES score will be counted as 75 for our foreign candidate students.

Admission Requirements for Neuroscience Master's Program

Student quota and requirements for candidates are announced at the beginning of each semester.

Applicants must have the following qualifications:

Applicants can apply for Medicine, Pharmacy, Biology, Molecular Biology and Genetics, Chemistry, Physics, Bioengineering, Chemical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Electrical/Electronics Engineering, Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation, Speech and Language Therapy, Occupational Therapy, Audiology, Nutrition, Child Development, Guidance and It is necessary to have a bachelor's degree in one of the fields of Psychological Counseling, Nursing, Psychology.

Candidates who have received their undergraduate degree abroad must have received diploma equivalency.

Dear candidate students;

There will be no science exam in our Thesis/Non-Thesis Master's Programs;

1) In our thesis programs, 65% of the ALES in the numerical score type, 35% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average,

2) In the non-thesis program, 50% of the undergraduate graduation grade, if any* 50% of the ALES in the relevant score type will be taken into consideration.

* (If candidates applying to non-thesis programs do not have an ALES score, they will be included in the evaluation as 55 points.)

Candidates;

- They must get at least 55 points from the numerical ALES,

- They must get at least 60 points from the Foreign Language Exam (YDS, e-YDS, YÖKDİL), (They can also take the language proficiency exam to be held by the Üsküdar University Foreign Languages Coordination Office.)

- If they receive their undergraduate education in English, they will be exempt from the language proficiency exam.
